message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to act as a code generator for an Entropy staged benchmark. I need to generate the artifacts for Stage: `web-003-chain-link`. **Stage Goal:** Create webpage 3 and link it back to page 2 while preserving the existing page 1 and page 2 links. **Existing files:** 1. `site/index.html` (Page 1) 2. `site/page-2.html` (Page 2) **Expected artifacts:** - `site/page-3.html` (html) **Validators that will run:** - `page-3-links-page-2`: failure_class=link_integrity (Checks if page 3 links back to page 2). - `previous-links-preserved`: failure_class=link_integrity (Checks if page 1 and page 2 links are still intact). **Current state of files:** `site/index.html`: ```html Home Page

Welcome Home

This is the main content area for the homepage.

``` (It has no outgoing links, only the structure.) `site/page-2.html`: ```html Page 2

Welcome to Page 2

This is the content for the second page.

Link back to Home Page

``` (It links to `index.html`.) **Task:** Create `site/page-3.html`. 1. `page-3.html` must contain content. 2. `page-3.html` must link back to `page-2.html`. 3. The existing links (`index.html` in `page-2.html`) must be preserved. **Drafting `site/page-3.html`:** It needs a title, content, and a link to `page-2.html`. ```html Page 3

Welcome to Page 3

This is the content for the third page.

Link back to Page 2

``` This fulfills the requirements: - Creates `site/page-3.html`. - Links back to `page-2.html`. - Preserves existing links (since I am only creating a new file and not modifying existing ones). I will generate the final JSON output.
